'''âj-s-b''' ('''kajasab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:camo|camo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:camo|camo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-s-b
|-
! Lemma
| kajasab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijasab|thijasab]] || [[word:jijasab|jijasab]] || [[word:shijasab|shijasab]] || [[word:kijasab|kijasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujasab|thuthujasab]] || [[word:jujujasab|jujujasab]] || [[word:shushujasab|shushujasab]] || [[word:kukujasab|kukujasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujasab|thujasab]] || [[word:jujasab|jujasab]] || [[word:shujasab|shujasab]] || [[word:kujasab|kujasab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujasab|thujasab]] || [[word:jujasab|jujasab]] || [[word:shujasab|shujasab]] || [[word:kujasab|kujasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejasab|thejasab]] || [[word:jejasab|jejasab]] || [[word:shejasab|shejasab]] || [[word:kejasab|kejasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojasab|thothojasab]] || [[word:jojojasab|jojojasab]] || [[word:shoshojasab|shoshojasab]] || [[word:kokojasab|kokojasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojasab|thojasab]] || [[word:jojasab|jojasab]] || [[word:shojasab|shojasab]] || [[word:kojasab|kojasab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojasab|thojasab]] || [[word:jojasab|jojasab]] || [[word:shojasab|shojasab]] || [[word:kojasab|kojasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjasab|thĂŠjasab]] || [[word:jĂŠjasab|jĂŠjasab]] || [[word:shĂŠjasab|shĂŠjasab]] || [[word:kĂŠjasab|kĂŠjasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajasab|thathajasab]] || [[word:jajajasab|jajajasab]] || [[word:shashajasab|shashajasab]] || [[word:kakajasab|kakajasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajasab|thajasab]] || [[word:jajasab|jajasab]] || [[word:shajasab|shajasab]] || [[word:kajasab|kajasab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajasab|thajasab]] || [[word:jajasab|jajasab]] || [[word:shajasab|shajasab]] || [[word:kajasab|kajasab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajasab|shajasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajasab|goshajasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajasab|gokishajasab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajasabnĂŒ|shajasabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajasabnknĂŒ|goshajasabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasabnĂŒ|gokishajasabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajasabshĂ«|shajasabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajasabnkshĂ«|goshajasabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajasabshĂ«|gokishajasabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasabro|shajasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasabnkro|goshajasabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasabro|gokishajasabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasabmu|shajasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasabnkmu|goshajasabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasabmu|gokishajasabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajasabsher|shajasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajasabnksher|goshajasabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajasabsher|gokishajasabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajasabng|shajasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajasabnkng|goshajasabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajasabng|gokishajasabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajasabya|shajasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajasabnkya|goshajasabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajasabya|gokishajasabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajasabyam|shajasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajasabnkyam|goshajasabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajasabyam|gokishajasabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasabnĂŒshĂ«|shajasabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajasabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajasabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasabnĂŒro|shajasabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasabnknĂŒro|goshajasabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasabnĂŒro|gokishajasabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasabnĂŒmu|shajasabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasabnknĂŒmu|goshajasabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasabnĂŒmu|gokishajasabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasabshĂ«nĂŒ|shajasabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajasabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajasabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasabshĂ«ro|shajasabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasabnkshĂ«ro|goshajasabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasabshĂ«ro|gokishajasabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasabshĂ«mu|shajasabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasabnkshĂ«mu|goshajasabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasabshĂ«mu|gokishajasabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasabronĂŒ|shajasabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasabnkronĂŒ|goshajasabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasabronĂŒ|gokishajasabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasabroshĂ«|shajasabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasabnkroshĂ«|goshajasabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasabroshĂ«|gokishajasabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajasabromu|shajasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajasabnkromu|goshajasabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajasabromu|gokishajasabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajasabmunĂŒ|shajasabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajasabnkmunĂŒ|goshajasabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajasabmunĂŒ|gokishajasabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajasabmushĂ«|shajasabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajasabnkmushĂ«|goshajasabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajasabmushĂ«|gokishajasabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajasabmuro|shajasabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajasabnkmuro|goshajasabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajasabmuro|gokishajasabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
